'''poradhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetated|vegetated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetated|vegetated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| poradhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:poradhithi|poradhithi]] || [[word:poradhiji|poradhiji]] || [[word:poradhishi|poradhishi]] || [[word:poradhiki|poradhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:poradhuthuthu|poradhuthuthu]] || [[word:poradhujuju|poradhujuju]] || [[word:poradhushushu|poradhushushu]] || [[word:poradhukuku|poradhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:poradhuthu|poradhuthu]] || [[word:poradhuju|poradhuju]] || [[word:poradhushu|poradhushu]] || [[word:poradhuku|poradhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:poradhufthuf|poradhufthuf]] || [[word:poradhufjuf|poradhufjuf]] || [[word:poradhufshuf|poradhufshuf]] || [[word:poradhufkuf|poradhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:poradhethe|poradhethe]] || [[word:poradheje|poradheje]] || [[word:poradheshe|poradheshe]] || [[word:poradheke|poradheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:poradhothotho|poradhothotho]] || [[word:poradhojojo|poradhojojo]] || [[word:poradhoshosho|poradhoshosho]] || [[word:poradhokoko|poradhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:poradhotho|poradhotho]] || [[word:poradhojo|poradhojo]] || [[word:poradhosho|poradhosho]] || [[word:poradhoko|poradhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:poradhofthof|poradhofthof]] || [[word:poradhofjof|poradhofjof]] || [[word:poradhofshof|poradhofshof]] || [[word:poradhofkof|poradhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfthĂŻf|poradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfjĂŻf|poradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfshĂŻf|poradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfkĂŻf|poradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|poradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|poradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|poradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|poradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfthĂŻf|poradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfjĂŻf|poradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfshĂŻf|poradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfkĂŻf|poradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfthĂŻf|poradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfjĂŻf|poradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfshĂŻf|poradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poradhĂŻfkĂŻf|poradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:poradhĂŠthĂŠ|poradhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:poradhĂŠjĂŠ|poradhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:poradhĂŠshĂŠ|poradhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:poradhĂŠkĂŠ|poradhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:poradhathatha|poradhathatha]] || [[word:poradhajaja|poradhajaja]] || [[word:poradhashasha|poradhashasha]] || [[word:poradhakaka|poradhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:poradhatha|poradhatha]] || [[word:poradhaja|poradhaja]] || [[word:poradhasha|poradhasha]] || [[word:poradhaka|poradhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:poradhafthaf|poradhafthaf]] || [[word:poradhafjaf|poradhafjaf]] || [[word:poradhafshaf|poradhafshaf]] || [[word:poradhafkaf|poradhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:poradhasha|poradhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:poradhshĂ«sha|poradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poradhrosha|poradhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poradhmusha|poradhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:poradhyasha|poradhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goporadhnkshĂ«sha|goporadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goporadhnkrosha|goporadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goporadhnkmusha|goporadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goporadhnkyasha|goporadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:poraradhasha|poraradhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poraradhshĂ«sha|poraradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poraradhrosha|poraradhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poraradhmusha|poraradhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poraradhyasha|poraradhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goporaradhnkshĂ«sha|goporaradhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goporaradhnkrosha|goporaradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goporaradhnkmusha|goporaradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goporaradhnkyasha|goporaradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:perĂŠdhasha|perĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:perĂŠdhshĂ«sha|perĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:perĂŠdhrosha|perĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:perĂŠdhmusha|perĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:perĂŠdhyasha|perĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goperĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|goperĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goperĂŠdhnkrosha|goperĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goperĂŠdhnkmusha|goperĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goperĂŠdhnkyasha|goperĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:porfadhasha|porfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:porfadhshĂ«sha|porfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:porfadhrosha|porfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:porfadhmusha|porfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:porfadhyasha|porfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goporfadhnkshĂ«sha|goporfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goporfadhnkrosha|goporfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goporfadhnkmusha|goporfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goporfadhnkyasha|goporfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
